description_long: This sculpture features a finely carved bust of a youthful figure with delicate facial features and wavy hair, gazing slightly upward and to the side. The head and neck are rendered in smooth, white marble, while the lower portion transitions into a geometric, angular base of veined stone, possibly onyx or marble, with natural striations in shades of gray and beige. The bust is mounted on a simple, rectangular plinth of a lighter, matte stone. The back of the head is less detailed, with a rougher finish, emphasizing the contrast between the polished face and the unfinished rear. The overall form combines classical portraiture with a modern, abstract base, creating a striking juxtaposition of organic and geometric elements. The sculpture exudes a sense of calm contemplation and is likely intended as a decorative or commemorative piece in a public or semi-public space.
description: A marble bust of a youthful figure with upward gaze, set atop a geometric, veined stone base and a rectangular plinth. The sculpture contrasts smooth, detailed facial features with a modern, angular support.
description_view_0: Front view showing the serene face, upward gaze, and the transition from the smooth bust to the veined geometric base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the wavy hair, and the angular cut of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rough, unfinished back of the head and the full rectangular shape of the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the ear, and the intersection of the bust with the angular base.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
